perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a vibrant graphic title card featuring the Costco Wholesale logo, a cartoon character, and the text 'Weekly Discount Report 07/07 - 07/13' against a warehouse background. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, each showcasing a different product on Costco's warehouse shelves. (3) For each product, a new visual phase is marked by a sudden cut to a different aisle or shelf location, showing items like meat packs, boxes of milk tea, stacked toilet paper, snacks, and detergents. (4) The camera remains mostly static or with very slight handheld movement for each product shot, focusing on the bulk packaging and the corresponding price overlay that appears centrally.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male narrator with an energetic and fast-paced tone begins speaking, announcing the name of each product and its discounted price. (3) Short sound effects like 'dings' or cash register sounds are heard periodically, synchronized with the appearance of the price reduction numbers on screen. (4) No ambient warehouse noise or background chatter is audible, indicating a clean studio-style voiceover and music track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) The intro features decorative 'Hook' text: '每周特價速報' (Weekly Special Price Report) and '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us). (2) Throughout the video, functional text overlays appear for every product, listing the name in Traditional Chinese (e.g., '西班牙伊比利豬五花燒烤', '義美厚奶茶') and English (e.g., 'KIRKLAND', 'KID-O'). (3) Large numerical text highlights the price details: '原價' (Original Price), the discount amount (e.g., '-160'), and the '特價' (Special Price).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product and price showcase -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No real people are visible on screen; only products and graphics.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Different sections of a Costco warehouse, including refrigerated aisles, dry goods shelves, and bulk storage racks.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Itemized Price List -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional digest for Costco Taiwan, aiming to inform members of specific high-value discounts available between July 7th and July 13th to drive foot traffic to the warehouse store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, store branding, and explicit price reduction announcements.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Rapid-fire narration paired with large yellow and white price text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical social media 'deal hunter' content style, optimized for mobile viewing with a fast pace to keep viewers engaged through multiple product categories.
